name: MeshFaceList
summary: Provides access to the faces and Face related functionality of a Mesh.

methods.name: AddFace(MeshFace)
methods.summary: Appends a new mesh face to the end of the mesh face list.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added face.

methods.name: AddFace(Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int AddFace(int vertex1, int vertex2, int vertex3)
methods.summary: Appends a new triangular face to the end of the mesh face list.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added triangle.

methods.name: AddFace(Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int AddFace(int vertex1, int vertex2, int vertex3, int vertex4)
methods.summary: Appends a new quadrangular face to the end of the mesh face list.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added quad.

methods.name: AddFaces
methods.summary: Appends a list of faces to the end of the mesh face list.

returns.doc: Indices of the newly created faces

methods.name: AdjacentFaces
methods.summary: Gets all faces that share a topological edge with a given face.

returns.doc: All indices that share an edge.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears the Face list on the mesh.

methods.name: ConvertNonPlanarQuadsToTriangles
methods.signature: public int ConvertNonPlanarQuadsToTriangles(double planarTolerance, double angleToleranceRadians, int splitMethod)
methods.summary: Splits non-planar quads into two triangles based on given parameters.
methods.remarks: If both planarTolerance = Rhino.RhinoMath.UnsetValue and angleToleranceRadians = Rhino.RhinoMath.UnsetValue, then all quads are split.

params.name: planarTolerance
params.doc: If planarTolerance >= 0, then a quad is split if its vertices are not coplanar. If both planarTolerance = Rhino.RhinoMath.UnsetValue and angleToleranceRadians >= 0.0, then the planarity test is skipped.

params.name: angleToleranceRadians
params.doc: If angleToleranceRadians >= 0.0, then a quad is split if the angle between opposite corner normals is > angleToleranceRadians. The corner normal is the normal to the triangle formed by two adjacent edges and the diagonal connecting their endpoints. A quad has four corner normals. If both angleToleranceRadians = Rhino.RhinoMath.UnsetValue and planarTolerance >= 0.0, then the corner normal angle test is skipped.

params.name: splitMethod
params.doc: 0 default Currently divides along the short diagonal. This may be changed as better methods are found or preferences change. By passing zero, you let the developers of this code decide what's best for you over time. 1 divide along the short diagonal 2 divide along the long diagonal 3 minimize resulting area 4 maximize resulting area 5 minimize angle between triangle normals 6 maximize angle between triangle normals

returns.doc: Number of quads that were converted to triangles.

methods.name: ConvertQuadsToTriangles
methods.summary: Splits all quads along the short diagonal.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ConvertTrianglesToQuads
methods.signature: public bool ConvertTrianglesToQuads(double angleToleranceRadians, double minimumDiagonalLengthRatio)
methods.summary: Joins adjacent triangles into quads if the resulting quad is 'nice'.

params.name: angleToleranceRadians
params.doc: Used to compare adjacent triangles' face normals. For two triangles to be considered, the angle between their face normals has to be <= angleToleranceRadians. When in doubt use RhinoMath.PI/90.0 (2 degrees).

params.name: minimumDiagonalLengthRatio
params.doc: ( <= 1.0) For two triangles to be considered the ratio of the resulting quad's diagonals (length of the shortest diagonal)/(length of longest diagonal). has to be >= minimumDiagonalLengthRatio. When in doubt us .875.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: CullDegenerateFaces
methods.summary: Attempts to removes degenerate faces from the mesh. Degenerate faces are faces that contains such a combination of indices, that their final shape collapsed in a line or point.Before returning, this method also attempts to repair faces by juggling vertex indices.

returns.doc: The number of degenerate faces that were removed.

methods.name: DeleteFaces(IEnumerable<Int32>)
methods.summary: Removes a collection of faces from the mesh without affecting the remaining geometry.

params.name: faceIndexes
params.doc: An array containing all the face indices to be removed.

returns.doc: The number of faces deleted on success.

methods.name: DeleteFaces(IEnumerable<Int32>, Boolean)
methods.signature: public int DeleteFaces(IEnumerable<int> faceIndexes, bool compact)
methods.summary: Removes a collection of faces from the mesh without affecting the remaining geometry.

params.name: faceIndexes
params.doc: An array containing all the face indices to be removed.

params.name: compact
params.doc: If true, removes vertices that are no longer referenced.

returns.doc: The number of faces deleted on success.

methods.name: Destroy
methods.summary: Releases all memory allocated to store faces. The list capacity will be 0 after this call. Subsequent calls can add new items.

methods.name: ExtractDuplicateFaces
methods.summary: Extracts, or removes, duplicate faces.

returns.doc: A mesh containing the extracted duplicate faces if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: ExtractFaces
methods.summary: Extracts, or removes, faces.

params.name: faceIndices
params.doc: The face indices to be extracted.

returns.doc: A mesh containing the extracted faces if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: GetClashingFacePairs
methods.summary: Gets an array of pairs of mesh faces that clash.

params.name: maxPairCount
params.doc: If >0, then at most this many pairs will be added to the output array. If <=0, then all clashing pairs will be added to the output array.

returns.doc: Array of pairs of mesh face indices.

methods.name: GetConnectedFaces(Int32)
methods.summary: Find all connected face indices

returns.doc: list of connected face indices

methods.name: GetConnectedFaces(Int32, Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public int[] GetConnectedFaces(int faceIndex, double angleRadians, bool greaterThanAngle)
methods.summary: Find all connected face indices where adjacent face normals meet the criteria of angleRadians and greaterThanAngle

params.name: angleRadians
params.doc: angle to use for comparison of what is connected

params.name: greaterThanAngle
params.doc: If true angles greater than or equal to are considered connected. If false, angles less than or equal to are considered connected.

returns.doc: list of connected face indices

methods.name: GetConnectedFacesToEdges
methods.signature: public int[] GetConnectedFacesToEdges(int startFaceIndex, bool treatNonmanifoldLikeUnwelded)
methods.summary: Uses startFaceIndex and finds all connected face indexes up to unwelded or naked edges. If treatNonmanifoldLikeUnwelded is true then non-manifold edges will be considered as unwelded or naked

params.name: treatNonmanifoldLikeUnwelded
params.doc: True means non-manifold edges will be handled like unwelded edges, False means they aren't considered

returns.doc: Array of connected face indexes

methods.name: GetDuplicateFaces
methods.summary: Finds all of the duplicate faces.

returns.doc: The indexes that are duplicates of other indexes if successful. If there are no duplicate, then an empty array is returned.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that yields all faces in this collection.

returns.doc: The enumerator.

methods.name: GetFace
methods.summary: Returns the mesh face at the given index.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of face to get. Must be larger than or equal to zero and smaller than the Face Count of the mesh.

returns.doc: The mesh face at the given index on success or MeshFace.Unset if the index is out of range.

methods.name: GetFaceAspectRatio
methods.summary: Returns the mesh face at the given index.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of face to get. Must be larger than or equal to zero and smaller than the Face Count of the mesh.

returns.doc: The mesh face at the given index on success or MeshFace.Unset if the index is out of range.

methods.name: GetFaceBoundingBox
methods.summary: Gets the bounding box of a face.

returns.doc: A new bounding box, or Empty on error.

methods.name: GetFaceCenter
methods.summary: Gets the center point of a face. For a triangular face, this is the centroid or barycenter.For a quad, this is the average of four comer points.

returns.doc: The center point.

methods.name: GetFaceVertices
methods.signature: public bool GetFaceVertices(int faceIndex, out Point3f a, out Point3f b, out Point3f c, out Point3f d)
methods.summary: Gets the 3D location of the vertices forming a face.

params.name: a
params.doc: A first point. This out argument is assigned during the call.

params.name: b
params.doc: A second point. This out argument is assigned during the call.

params.name: c
params.doc: A third point. This out argument is assigned during the call.

params.name: d
params.doc: A fourth point. This out argument is assigned during the call.

returns.doc: true if the operation succeeded, otherwise false.

methods.name: GetTopologicalVertices
methods.summary: Gets the topology vertex indices of a face.

returns.doc: An array of integers.

methods.name: GetZeroAreaFaces
methods.signature: public bool GetZeroAreaFaces(out int[] whollyDegenerateFaces, out int[] partiallyDegenerateFaces)
methods.summary: Examines and adds face indexes to whollyDegenerateFaces if the face is a triangle with zero area or a quad both triangles have zero area. Face indexes are added to partiallyDegenerateFaces when a quad has one triangle with zero area.

params.name: whollyDegenerateFaces
params.doc: Array of indexes for faces, both triangles and quads, that have zero area.

params.name: partiallyDegenerateFaces
params.doc: Array of indexes for quad faces, that have one triangle with zero area.

returns.doc: Returns true if the mesh has wholly or partially degenerate faces, false otherwise.

methods.name: HasNakedEdges
methods.summary: Returns true if at least one of the face edges are not topologically connected to any other faces.

returns.doc: true if that face makes the mesh open, otherwise false.

methods.name: Insert
methods.signature: public void Insert(int index, MeshFace face)
methods.summary: Inserts a mesh face at a defined index in this list.

throws.when: If index is negative or >= Count.

methods.name: IsHidden
methods.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a face is hidden. A face is hidden if, and only if, at least one of its vertices is hidden.

returns.doc: true if hidden, false if fully visible.

methods.name: MergeAdjacentFaces
methods.summary: Merges two triangular mesh faces that share an edge into one quadrangular face.

returns.doc: true if successful, false otherwise.

methods.name: RemoveAt(Int32)
methods.summary: Removes a face from the mesh.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index of the face that will be removed.

methods.name: RemoveAt(Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public void RemoveAt(int index, bool compact)
methods.summary: Removes a face from the mesh.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index of the face that will be removed.

params.name: compact
params.doc: If true, removes vertices that are no longer referenced.

methods.name: RemoveZeroAreaFaces
methods.summary: Deletes or fixes mesh faces that have zero area.

params.name: fixedFaceCount
params.doc: Number of fixed partially degenerate faces.

returns.doc: Number of removed wholly degenerate faces.

methods.name: SetFace(Int32, MeshFace)
methods.signature: public bool SetFace(int index, MeshFace face)
methods.summary: Sets a face at a specific index of the mesh.

returns.doc: true if the operation succeeded, otherwise false.

methods.name: SetFace(Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetFace(int index, int vertex1, int vertex2, int vertex3)
methods.summary: Sets a triangular face at a specific index of the mesh.

returns.doc: true if the operation succeeded, otherwise false.

methods.name: SetFace(Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetFace(int index, int vertex1, int vertex2, int vertex3, int vertex4)
methods.summary: Sets a quadrangular face at a specific index of the mesh.

returns.doc: true if the operation succeeded, otherwise false.

methods.name: ToIntArray(Boolean)
methods.summary: Copies all of the face indices to a linear array of indices per face. Note that this includes indices from invalid faces too.

params.name: asTriangles
params.doc: If set to true as triangles.

returns.doc: The int array. This method never returns null.

methods.name: ToIntArray(Boolean, List<Int32>)
methods.signature: public int[] ToIntArray(bool asTriangles, ref List<int> replacedIndices)
methods.summary: Copies all of the faces to a linear array of indices. Clean-up of vertex indices if replacedIndices is a valid List<int> ///

params.name: asTriangles
params.doc: If set to true as triangles.

params.name: replacedIndices
params.doc: List is populated with vertex indices that were replaced with 0. If replacedIndices is null there will be no cleanup

returns.doc: The int array. This method never returns null.

properties.name: Capacity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the total number of mesh triangles and quads the internal data structure can hold without resizing.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of mesh faces. When getting this can includes invalid faces.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Returns the mesh face at the given index.

properties.name: QuadCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of faces that are valid quads (4 corners).

properties.name: TriangleCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of faces that are valid triangles (3 corners).
